bugs.desc: report_add_quantity_dialog.dart had no testing keys (FIXED by agent). Dismissing dialog caused _dependents.isEmpty assertion crash (red screen). App required full restart.

DraftsListScreen: checkbox taps via driver update visual state but _selectedIds set does not update. Review Selected button stays disabled (onPressed: null). Likely StatefulWidget state management issue with driver interactions.
entry_equipment table missing created_at column on Supabase remote — caused persistent sync push failure (PGRST204). Fixed with migration 20260321000002.
[SECURITY] entry_equipment and entry_personnel tables have UNRESTRICTED RLS — no policies. Need RLS enabled + project-scoped policies.
entry_personnel table appears to be an orphan (app uses entry_personnel_counts). Investigate if it can be dropped.
[FEATURE] MDOT 0582B forms have no submit workflow — section-by-section completion only. No form_submit_btn exists. T37 marked N/A.
[FEATURE] MDOT 0582B forms should be attachable to daily entries. If form date aligns with entry date, prompt user to attach. Currently forms live independently with no entry link.

[DRIVER] DropdownButton duplicate keys: popup overlay items share keys with collapsed dropdown items. Driver taps the hidden collapsed item instead of the popup item when reverting selection. Role revert from Engineer->Inspector failed via driver.
[SYNC] Persistent 'Sync error: Sync failed' banner on Admin Dashboard. Visible in T53-T58 screenshots.
[BUG] Duplicate GlobalKeys detected in widget tree — appeared twice during session. Causes widget tree truncation and unpredictable behavior.
[SYNC] Integrity check failed for entry_contractors — PostgrestException 'Invalid table name: entry_contractors' (P0001). Sync engine references a table name that doesn't exist on Supabase.
[MISSING KEY] contractor_editor_view_mode duplicate key — two contractors share the same static key. Also personnel_types_add key does not exist.
[LAYOUT] Report screen inline preview on home screen does not scroll past Safety section — Quantities and Attachments/Photos sections are not accessible. Photos exist but cannot be interacted with.
[DRIVER] InputChip delete button (equipment chip X icon) — driver tap hits onPressed not onDeleted. Cannot delete equipment via driver.
[MISSING KEY] Form response delete buttons on forms_list_screen have no testing keys. Trash icons visible but not tappable via driver.
[NAV BUG] settings_trash_tile tap navigates to Projects screen instead of Trash screen. Routing issue.

[SYNC] 5 unresolved conflicts on sync dashboard: bid_items, contractors, locations, 2x daily_entries. All remote-originated. Conflicts created by local delete operations (T70-T72) conflicting with remote data.
[SYNC] Pull skips (FK violation): 2 project_assignments skipped — parent project missing locally. Pull reports 0 pulled but silently skips records.
[SYNC] Sync dashboard shows 5 conflicts and pull skips are not counted as errors. Sync reports 'completed' with 0 errors while data is actually missing.
